description: MCTS-TD Memory hooks — 全程跟随 Agent: Setup 启动后台监控, SessionStart 清理旧版+加载记忆, SessionEnd 巩固

hooks.command: node -e "const p=require('path').join(require('os').homedir(),'.claude/plugins/cache/mcts-td-planner/mcts-td-planner');const d=require('fs').readdirSync(p).filter(x=>/^\d/.test(x)).sort();const s=require('path').join(p,d[d.length-1],'scripts/agent_daemon.js');if(require('fs').existsSync(s)){require('child_process').execSync('node \"'+s+'\" start > /dev/null 2>&1 \u0026');console.log('[MCTS-TD] Agent daemon started')}else{console.log('[MCTS-TD] Agent daemon starting...')}"

node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const os=require('os');const cache=path.join(os.homedir(),'.claude/plugins/cache/mcts-td-planner/mcts-td-planner');if(!fs.existsSync(cache))process.exit(0);const dirs=fs.readdirSync(cache).filter(d=>/^\d+\.\d+\.\d+$/.test(d)).sort((a,b)=>{const[a1,a2,a3]=a.split('.').map(Number);const[b1,b2,b3]=b.split('.').map(Number);return b1-a1||b2-a2||b3-a3});const latest=dirs[0];for(const d of dirs.slice(1)){fs.rmSync(path.join(cache,d),{recursive:true,force:true})};console.log('[MCTS-TD] Ready v'+latest);(function(){try{const io=require(path.join(cache,latest,'scripts/mma/io'));const kg=io.loadMMA();if(kg.meta.total_points>0){console.log('[MCTS-TD] Memory loaded: '+kg.meta.total_points+' points across '+(Object.keys(kg.meridians).filter(k=>kg.meridians[k].points.length>0).length)+' meridians')}else{console.log('[MCTS-TD] Cold start')}}catch(e){}})()"

node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const os=require('os');const mem=path.join(os.homedir(),'.claude/data/skills/mcts-td-planner/memory');const bf=path.join(mem,'agent_buffer.json');let buf={pending:[]};if(fs.existsSync(bf)){try{buf=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(bf,'utf-8'))}catch(e){}};const ts=new Date().toISOString();buf.pending.push({type:'deqi',data:{auto:true},timestamp:ts});if(buf.pending.length>200)buf.pending=buf.pending.slice(-200);fs.writeFileSync(bf,JSON.stringify(buf))"
